prompt: Create a dramatic Japanese weekly manga magazine cover, glossy print design, packed and chaotic like a real shonen magazine issue. The cover title at the top left is a huge red-and-white masthead reading "週刊 MAGAZINE NEO" with thick black outlines, and at the top right a black issue box reading "2027年 18号". Add a small price box on the left that says "特別定価 450円" and a barcode beneath it. The overall theme is a near-future cyberpunk racing manga launch issue with saturated neon lighting, rain-slick reflections, and a high-energy editorial layout full of starbursts, callouts, and teaser boxes. The central background shows a futuristic city street at night with magenta, cyan, and blue neon signs and wet pavement, and in the upper right background a sleek black Formula-style race car with glowing cyan accents speeding through the city. In the center foreground, place 1 main protagonist: a young anime man with messy black hair, wearing a black high-tech racing suit traced with glowing cyan circuit lines, headphones around his neck, and a small chest patch that says "NEO.JP"; he stands facing forward in a heroic pose. On the right side, place the large vertical series title in distressed white letters: "FORMULA NEO" with smaller vertical Japanese text "フォーミュラネオ". Near that, include a credit box reading "原作・F1NEO.jp" and beneath it "/漫画・". Add a large yellow circular burst at the upper right with bold magenta and black text: "巻頭カラー 64p!! 超ボリュームで開幕!!!". Add a jagged yellow burst on the upper left-middle that says "ぶっちぎりの新連載!!" and a diagonal magenta ribbon nearby that says "2089年 最速の物語が始まる―". In the lower half, arrange 7 supporting characters around the hero: 1 silver-haired man in a white futuristic coat with blue glowing lines on the left; 1 red-haired tough-looking young man in a black-and-red jacket at bottom left with fire blazing from his right fist; 1 hooded figure in a purple cloak holding a glowing purple book left of center; 1 short blue-black-haired girl in a dark tech outfit at center holding a transparent holographic interface; 1 brown-haired young man in a gray racing jacket with arms crossed at right center; 1 green-haired gentle-looking girl in a pale top near lower right center; and 1 blond youth in a yellow outfit on the far right holding up a small cube or die. In front near the bottom center, add 1 small pink-haired chibi-like or younger character in a pale pink hoodie with hands clasped. Add a black jagged burst on the lower left that says "描き下ろし特別ポスター付録!!". Across the lower middle, add a bold promotional line in white, cyan, and red: "今号も激アツ新連載＆人気作が勢揃い!!". Along the very bottom, include 4 rectangular teaser panels for other manga series, each with a colored banner tag at the top and Japanese titles: panel 1 red tag "新連載!" with title "覇の剣聖" and subtitle "～宿命の刃～"; panel 2 blue tag "新連載!" with title "アストラル・コード" and subtitle "～銀河の記憶～"; panel 3 pink tag "激推し!" with title "エリクシア・ハート" and subtitle "～魔法少女再起動!～"; panel 4 green tag "激推し!" with title "喧嘩王キング" and subtitle "～頂上決戦編～". Near the lower right, add a small inset image of the same magazine volume with text beside it reading "最新単行本 第1巻 4月15日発売!!". At the very bottom, place a white disclaimer line across a black strip: "※これはファンメイドのフィクションです。実在の雑誌・出版社とは関係ありません。". Use bold manga cover typography, exaggerated Japanese magazine composition, dense overlapping text, thick outlines, explosive bursts, glossy highlights, gritty neon cyberpunk atmosphere, and polished anime illustration.
